title: Grand Birch Gas Log Set | Heat & Glo
description: Grand Birch gas log set: a contemporary white-bark birch log arrangement designed to bring the modern lodge aesthetic into a traditional fireplace opening.

hero.eyebrow: GRAND BIRCH — VENTED GAS LOG SET
hero.h1: Birch logs. White bark. Modern-lodge fire.
hero.lede: The Grand Birch translates the modern lodge aesthetic into a traditional fireplace opening. White-bark birch log detail, layered flame pattern, vented configuration. The contemporary alternative to a classic oak log set.
